channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenya High Court Rules Prosecuting Consensual Teenage Relationships Violates Constitution
item.description: The High Court in Nairobi has delivered a landmark ruling on the application of Kenya's Sexual Offences Act, declaring that prosecuting adolescents in consensual, non-coercive peer relationships is un...

item.title: Truecaller launches eSIM services for travelers to expand subscription revenue
item.description: Truecaller, the popular caller ID and communication app, has launched eSIM services aimed at international travelers as part of its strategy to diversify revenue streams amid declining ad income. The ...

item.title: Ukraine Confirms Drone Attack on Russian Refinery Amid Rising Long-Range Strikes
item.description: Ukraine has reported a successful drone strike targeting a Russian oil refinery located deep within Russian territory, signalling a significant escalation in the ongoing conflict between the two natio...

item.title: Venezuela Fury's Wedding Overshadowed by Famous Family Member
item.description: Venezuela Fury, the 16-year-old eldest daughter of boxing champion Tyson Fury, celebrated her birthday and recent marriage to Noah Price with lavish events attended by hundreds of guests. While it was...

item.title: Understanding Higher Electricity Bills Due to Outdated Power Grid
item.description: Many Filipinos have noticed a sudden increase in their electricity bills this month. While higher usage during the hot summer season contributes slightly, the main driver of the rising costs is the co...

item.title: Practical Advice for Maintaining a Healthy Gut
item.description: Maintaining a healthy gut is central to overall well-being, according to gastroenterology experts. A balanced diet rich in fibre, fruit, vegetables, legumes, and wholegrains is fundamental, while irri...

item.title: Air Transat cabin crew barred from cannabis use off-duty due to safety concerns
item.description: In a landmark labour ruling, arbitrator Nathalie Massicotte upheld Air Transat's policy prohibiting flight and cabin crew from consuming cannabis at any time, even during their personal time. The deci...

item.title: President Marcos assures Navotas landfill fire will not recur
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. visited Obando, Bulacan on Thursday to reassure residents affected by the month-long fire at the Navotas Sanitary Landfill. During the 'Bawat Bayan Makikinaba...

item.title: Desmond Elliot contests APC primary result in Surulere citing irregularities
item.description: Lagos State lawmaker and Nollywood actor, Desmond Elliot, don reject the APC primary election result for Surulere Constituency I after he lose to Barakat Odunuga-Bakare. Elliot claim say plenty irregu...

item.title: UK net migration drops to 171,000 as asylum applications increase
item.description: New figures released by the Office for National Statistics (ONS) indicate that net migration to the United Kingdom has decreased significantly, falling to 171,000 last year, almost half the previous y...

item.title: Shell and MAN Collaborate with Rivers State to Boost Industrial Gas Supply
item.description: Shell Nigeria Gas Limited, together with the Manufacturers Association of Nigeria (MAN), don show serious support for Rivers State plan wey dey aim to expand gas supply to industries. Dis effort na pa...

item.title: Global Health Experts Warn AMR Remains a Persistent Threat to Health Systems
item.description: The World Health Organization (WHO) continues to warn that antimicrobial resistance (AMR) is a serious global health threat, despite ongoing efforts worldwide. In 2019, AMR contributed to nearly 5 mil...

item.title: Life in China During the Early 1920s Through Vintage Photographs
item.description: Life in China during the early 1920s reflected a stark contrast between rapid modernization in urban centers and traditional rural life. In cities like Shanghai and Guangzhou, new technologies such as...

item.title: Why Kenya Keeps Struggling With High Fuel Prices Despite Local Oil
item.description: Kenya's fuel crisis isn’t just about President William Ruto or the current administration. The root cause goes back to the 2013 closure of the Changamwe refinery and long-standing foreign control of t...

item.title: Faisal Shuaibu emerges APC senatorial candidate for Nasarawa West
item.description: Faisal Shuaibu, wey be former chairman of the National Primary Health Care Development Agency (NPHCDA), don secure the All Progressives Congress (APC) senatorial ticket for Nasarawa West. The announce...

item.title: Mako Nishimura: Life Inside and Beyond Japan’s Yakuza
item.description: Mako Nishimura, possibly the only woman to fully join Japan's male-dominated yakuza, lived a life of violence, crime, and eventual redemption. From a troubled childhood marked by strict parenting and ...

item.title: BARMM Peace Adviser Urges Calm and Unity Ahead of Historic September Elections

item.title: CDSCO clarifies definition and safe use of cosmetics in India
item.description: The Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation (CDSCO) of India has issued a clarification regarding what constitutes cosmetic products under the Drugs and Cosmetics Act, 1940. According to the notic...

item.title: Rivers State Government Appreciates Anglican Church for Contributions to Peace and Community Development
item.description: The Rivers State Government don show high respect and appreciation for the Anglican Church of Nigeria for the role wey dem dey play for development of Rivers State. Governor Siminalayi Fubara yan say ...

item.title: The Role of Fruits and Vegetables in Supporting Mental Health Across Lifespan
item.description: Mental health is a critical aspect of overall well-being, influenced by genetics, environment, social factors, and lifestyle habits, including diet. Recent research highlights that diets rich in fruit...
